title: Smoky Roasted Egyptian Stew
description: A hearty stew with smoky roasted flavors from the Middle East, made with tender beef and warm spices.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and carrot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the roasted garlic, smoky paprika, and egyptian coriander, and cook for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with pomegranate seeds if desired.
Stir fry any remaining vegetables or meat before serving, if desired.
